top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles'
  AND s.Charter = 'N'
  AND f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE schools.County = 'Los Angeles' 
  AND frpm.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 'N' 
  AND frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles'
  AND s.Charter = 'N'
  AND f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE schools.County = 'Los Angeles' 
  AND frpm.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 'N' 
  AND frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles'
  AND s.Charter = 'N'
  AND f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*)  
FROM frpm  
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode  
WHERE schools.County = 'Los Angeles'  
  AND frpm.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 'N'  
  AND CAST(REPLACE(frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`, '%', '') AS REAL) < 0.18;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE schools.County = 'Los Angeles' 
  AND frpm.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 'N' 
  AND frpm.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles'
  AND s.Charter = 'N'
  AND f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` < 0.18;
